phrases.intent_en: Ask when the gift card desk closes
phrases.text_local: V kolik zavírá prodejna dárkových karet?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech uses 24-hour time officially, but in speech 've 20 hodin' (at 20 hours) is common.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how the food court prepaid card works
phrases.text_local: Jak funguje ta karta do food courtu?
phrases.cultural_note: Prepaid cards for food courts are common in Czech malls; 'nabijete' (you charge/top up) is the key verb.

likely_response.local: Nabijete ji na pokladně a pak platíte.
likely_response.translation_en: You top it up at the cash desk, then pay.

responses.english: You top it up at the cash desk, then pay.
responses.french: Nabijete ji na pokladně a pak platíte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Cinema City ticket counter is
phrases.cultural_note: Czech directions often use 'nahoře' (upstairs) and 'vpravo/vlevo' (right/left) relative to escalators.

likely_response.translation_en: Upstairs, all the way to the right.

responses.english: Upstairs, all the way to the right.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if parking validation is available
phrases.cultural_note: Parking validation ('validace parkování') usually happens at machines before returning to the car.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the machines are by the elevators.

responses.english: Yes, the machines are by the elevators.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tax refund desk is
phrases.text_local: Kde najdu přepážku pro vrácení daně?
phrases.cultural_note: Tax refund desks ('vrácení daně') are typically near information or currency exchange points.

likely_response.local: V přízemí, vedle hlavní informační přepážky.
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, next to the main information desk.

responses.english: On the ground floor, next to the main information desk.
responses.french: V přízemí, vedle hlavní informační přepážky.
